name: Crafty Plus V2 Vaporizer
summary: A compact German-engineered hybrid portable, medically certified, for patients who want a simple pocket device.
description: The Crafty+ V2 is Storz & Bickel's most pocketable vaporiser, with hybrid conduction and convection heating and a ceramic-coated chamber for clean, even extraction. It is certified under the Medical Device Directive, charges over USB-C, and uses a stripped-back one-button design with app control for fine temperature steps between 40°C and 210°C. A dosing capsule is included for tidy, pre-measured loads. It suits patients who want certified German hardware in the smallest, simplest form. Battery life is around 90 minutes per charge, so heavy all-day users may want to medicate near a charger.
